entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00189) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00189 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO MODIFY THE SUBCLIN 8021AC-2 "UDRS O&M".
14A. SUBCLIN 8021AC-2 PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE WHEN CREATED WAS FROM APRIL 9, 2016 TO JULY 1, 2016. 14B. SUBCLIN 8021AC-2 PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE BEGGINING DATE WILL CHANGE FROM APRIL 9, 2016 TO MARCH 10, 2016. 14C. SUBCLIN 8021AC-2 PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE ENDING DATE OF JULY 1, 2016 WILL REMAIN UNCHANGED. 14D. FUNDING FOR THIS EFFORT WILL BE FUNDED VIA MODIFICATION P00030 TO THE TASK ORDER IS HSTS01-11-J-DAD003. 14E. THE EXPANSION IN THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE WILL NOT CAUSE AN ADDITIONAL COST TO THE TSA.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00190) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00190 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE THE FOLLOWING SUBCLINS: SUBCLIN 8003AA "COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO)" SUBCLIN 8003AD "COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO) - MOBILE"
FUNDING FOR THIS EFFORT WILL BE PROVIDED VIA MODIFICATION P00004 TO THE TASK ORDER IS HSTS01-16-J-HRM025. SUBSEQUENT FUNDING WILL BE OBLIGATED VIA TASK ORDER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00191) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00191 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
1) TO ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 7035 "TSO MEDICAL HOLD REDUCTION"; 2) TO REIMBURSE LOCKHEED MARTIN $5,770.54 FOR THE ACTUALS ACCRUED DUE TO THE CHANGES MADE IN MODIFICATION P00175 TO THE IDIQ CONTRACT FOR REDUCING MEDICAL HOLD PROCESSING TIMES. THIS COST IS WITHIN THE AMOUNT AGREED UPON IN ROM NOLOG15 MED SUP TSO SUBMITTED TO AND AUTHORIZED BY THE TSA ON NOVEMBER 20, 2015.
THE FUNDING FOR THIS EFFORT WILL BE PROVIDED VIA MODIFICATION P00001 TO THE TASK ORDER HSTS01-16-J-HRM010.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00192) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00192 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 8009C "FAMS SERVICES - ASSESSMENT BATTERY TEST" FOR THE PURPOSE OF 5,000 ADDITIONAL FAB TESTS.
14A. THE FUNDING FOR THIS EFFORT WILL BE PROVIDED VIA MODIFICATION P00005 TO THE TASK ORDER HSTS01-16-J-HRM025.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00193) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00193 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE CLINS 8005AB AND 8006AA ALONG WITH CHANGING THE CO FROM EVELYN TYNDELL TO CHARLES STRICKLAND EFFECTIVE 1/1/2016.
14A. THE FUNDING FOR THIS EFFORT WILL BE PROVIDED VIA MODIFICATION P00007 TO THE TASK ORDER HSTS01-16-J-HRM025.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00197) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00197 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS: 14A. TO ADD AND EXERCISE SUBCLIN 8003AE "CBT SUPPORT SERVICES" IN THE AMOUNT OF $524,028.00. 14B. TO EXERCISE SUBCLIN 8016AA "PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING" IN THE AMOUNT OF $646,950.00. 14C. TO DOCUMENT AND AUTHORIZE THE KEY PERSONNEL CHANGE IN PROGRAM MANAGER OF ELMER NELSON WITH JEFFREY FISHER EFFECTIVE JUNE 3, 2016.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
